titleStmt.title: SII 28.64: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 64. (A.R. No. 63 of 1913.) TIRUCHCHEṄGĀṬṬĀṄGUḌI, NANNILAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Uttarāpatīśvara temple, Gaṇapatīśvara shrine, west base of the maṇḍapa in front of

p.hi: Rājarāja (III?) Year 7, KarkaTaka śu. 11, Monday, Hastam, Irregular.
p.note: Cf. Annual Report for epigraphy, 1913. Attributing this record to Rājarāja III and taking the month to be a mistake for Rishabha, the date has been equated to 1218 A.D. May 7 f.d.t. ·08 and f.d.n. ·99 by. D.S.Pillai. But palaeographically the record is attributable to Rājarāja II.

summary.p: at the right end and bottom. It records the gift of land as kāśu-koḷḷāiṟai-ili (made tax-free without getting compensation) to God Uttarāpatināyakar and Chiṟuttoṇḍa-dēvar in the temple of Uttarāpati-nāyakar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevarkku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟup pūrvapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ keyamāṇikka vaḷanāṭṭu
kum Uṭaiyār Uttarāpati nāyakar koyil cimāhesvara kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum cikāriyañ ceyvārkkum tevarkanmi koyil kaṇakkanukkum Innāṭṭu maruṅkūrāṉa rājanārāya
viruvom Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta paricāvatu Uṭaiyār Uttarāpati nāyakarkkum Ikkoyil ciṟuttoṇṭa tevarkkum kācu koḷḷā Iṟaiyiliyāka Āṇṭār poyyā
ṭṭa nilattu Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta rūpāy 2(1/2) Innilam Iraṇṭaraiyum viḷanilattupparai makkaḷThe reading is doubtful. The writer seems to have got confused while inscribing the word.Iṟaiyiliyāna nilattu Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta rūpāy kūnpam Inni
ṇam paṇṇikuṭuttamaiyil Intap pirāmaṇappaṭiye cantirātittavaṟ
Digital edition of SII 28.64 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
